childhood.familyBackground: Born December 7, 1952 in Tula Oblast. Mining and engineering family background.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1952년 12월 7일 툴라 주에서 태어남. 광업 및 공학 가족 배경.
childhood.education: Mining Department of Tula Polytechnic Institute (1975); PhD in mining engineering (1991)
childhood.educationKo: 툴라 공과대학 광업부 졸업(1975); 광업공학 박사(1991)
childhood.earlyLife: Started as mining engineer at Kopeisk Engineering Plant. Developed 41 patents and inventor's certificates.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Kopeisk Engineering Plant의 광업 엔지니어로 시작. 41개 특허 및 발명자 증명서 개발.

careerTimeline.event: Graduated and began work at Kopeisk Engineering Plant as mining engineer
careerTimeline.eventKo: 졸업 후 Kopeisk Engineering Plant의 광업 엔지니어로 근무 시작

careerTimeline.event: Defended PhD thesis on efficient mining equipment and machinery
careerTimeline.eventKo: 효율적인 광업 장비에 관한 박사 논문 방어

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Sibuglemet private coal mining company with Smolyaninov and Bukhtoyarov
careerTimeline.eventKo: Smolyaninov과 Bukhtoyarov와 함께 Sibuglemet 석탄 채광 회사 공동창립

careerTimeline.event: Stepped down as General Director of Sibuglemet
Acquired equity stake in Uralkali, Russian potash producer
careerTimeline.eventKo: 러시아 칼륨 생산자 Uralkali의 지분 인수

careerTimeline.event: Sold shares in Sibuglemet and Uralkali

personalTraits.knownFor: Mining engineering expertise, coal mining operations, 41 patents in mining technology
personalTraits.knownForKo: 광업 엔지니어링 전문성, 석탄 채광 운영, 광업 기술의 41개 특허
